query:
-- Audio URL patterns in tracks
SELECT 'tracks.audioUrl' AS source,
  CASE
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' THEN 'DEAD: sandbox CDN'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%manus-storage%' THEN 'DEAD: manus proxy'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%replicate.delivery%' THEN 'EXPIRING: Replicate (24h)'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%pbxt.replicate.delivery%' THEN 'EXPIRING: Replicate (24h)'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%dnznrvs05pmza.cloudfront.net%' THEN 'EXPIRING: Runway signed URL'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%fal.media%' THEN 'CHECK: fal.ai CDN'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%cloudfront.net%' THEN 'cloudfront (check which)'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%amazonaws.com%' THEN 'LIVE: S3/Railway'
    ELSE CONCAT('OTHER: ', LEFT(audioUrl, 60))
  END AS url_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM tracks
GROUP BY url_type

UNION ALL

-- Cover art URL patterns in tracks
SELECT 'tracks.coverArtUrl' AS source,
  CASE
    WHEN coverArtUrl IS NULL OR coverArtUrl = '' THEN 'null/empty'
    WHEN coverArtUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' THEN 'DEAD: sandbox CDN'
    WHEN coverArtUrl LIKE '%dnznrvs05pmza.cloudfront.net%' THEN 'EXPIRING: Runway signed URL'
    WHEN coverArtUrl LIKE '%fal.media%' THEN 'CHECK: fal.ai CDN'
    WHEN coverArtUrl LIKE '%replicate.delivery%' THEN 'EXPIRING: Replicate (24h)'
    WHEN coverArtUrl LIKE '%amazonaws.com%' THEN 'LIVE: S3/Railway'
    WHEN coverArtUrl LIKE '%cloudfront.net%' THEN 'cloudfront (check which)'
    ELSE CONCAT('OTHER: ', LEFT(coverArtUrl, 60))
  END AS url_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM tracks
GROUP BY url_type

UNION ALL

-- Audio URL patterns in music_generations
SELECT 'music_generations.audioUrl' AS source,
  CASE
    WHEN audioUrl IS NULL OR audioUrl = '' THEN 'null/empty'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' THEN 'DEAD: sandbox CDN'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%replicate.delivery%' THEN 'EXPIRING: Replicate (24h)'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%pbxt.replicate.delivery%' THEN 'EXPIRING: Replicate (24h)'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%amazonaws.com%' THEN 'LIVE: S3/Railway'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%cloudfront.net%' THEN 'cloudfront (check which)'
    ELSE CONCAT('OTHER: ', LEFT(audioUrl, 60))
  END AS url_type,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM music_generations
GROUP BY url_type

ORDER BY source, cnt DESC;
